text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Natureee! Quick, you gotta pick between
bittersweet matcha raspberry soda or café au
mayonnaise pear!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh, I guess I'll go with... wait, what the heck are
those options?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
There's a wacky vending machine at the edge of
an empty lot by—oh, actually, would you rather
try the honey bok choy flavor? ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nope. I get you're adventurous, but this has to
stop. Just no.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Just get some normal old carrot juice. A boring
flavor you can trust has gotta be better than
barfing up some weirdo drink in the bathroom.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: But, but! Maybe these ones won't gimme the woozies! Today's my chance to meet something new and marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
When I was little, I thought I hated peppers, but
now I love those lil' guys! ☆ When your body
grows up, your tastes grow too! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Sooo maybe the drinks aren't bad either!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No, what am I saying?! This isn't a matter of
maturity! I almost fell for it...
